summary: SDM Rewards - QR Code URL-based scanning bug fix verified. All 6 tests passed (100%). The fix properly handles merchant QR codes that encode URLs (https://xxx/pay/SDM-M-XXXX format). PayPage displays merchant info, sessionStorage preserves pending payment across login, and payment modal opens with correct merchant after authentication.
critical_code_review_comments: PayPage.jsx correctly fetches merchant info via /api/merchants/by-qr/{merchantCode} endpoint
sessionStorage used to persist pending_merchant_payment across login flow
ClientAuthPage.jsx properly reads sessionStorage and passes merchantQR via navigation state
ClientDashboard.jsx handleMerchantFromPartners correctly opens payment modal from location.state
QRScanner extractQRCode function handles URL format (/pay/SDM-M-XXXX), SDM: prefix, and ref= parameter formats
seed_data_creation: Used existing test merchant 'Test Shop' with QR code SDM-M-6D343A81
context_for_next_testing_agent: QR code URL scanning bug fix verified. The /pay/:merchantCode route is working correctly. Test with phone +233541234567 and password Test123456!

test_1_pay_page_display.details: PayPage shows merchant 'Test Shop' with 'Pay to' label and 'Sign In to Pay' button

test_2_login_redirect.details: Redirects to /client login page and stores merchantCode in sessionStorage

test_3_full_flow.flow: PayPage → Login → Dashboard with Payment Modal
test_3_full_flow.details: After login, user redirected to dashboard with payment modal showing 'Test Shop' and 5% Cashback

test_4_extractQRCode_function.details: All 6 QR code format extractions work correctly

test_5_invalid_qr_handling.details: Shows 'Invalid QR Code' error with 'Merchant not found' message and 'Go to Home' button

test_6_logged_in_user_redirect.details: Immediately redirects to dashboard with payment modal showing correct merchant

api_verification_results.GET /api/merchants/by-qr/SDM-M-6D343A81: 200 OK - Returns merchant {business_name: 'Test Shop', payment_qr_code: 'SDM-M-6D343A81', cashback_rate: 5.0}

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Users could not scan merchant QR codes from their phones. QR codes encode URLs (https://xxx/pay/SDM-M-XXXX) but scanner only extracted simple format (SDM:xxx)
fix_applied: Updated QRScanner extractQRCode to parse URL formats
Added sessionStorage to preserve pending merchant payment across login
